# QA Plan: Sprint 19 — C2 Close, Catalog P2, OSINT E2E
**Date**: 2026-06-08
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 9 tasks across 6 systems (C2 UI, Catalog/Data, OSINT, Wave-5 epic, GDD design, CI infra, Cesium spike, Hindsight)
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (`6000.3.14f1`) + .NET 8 headless
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-19.md`
**Baseline**: `main` @ `afd2e1a` — **385** solution tests, **7** PlayMode smoke, **7** replay golden (Sprint 18 closeout)

## Automated Tests Required

### S19-01 — Unity C2 Manual Sign-off — UI (headless proxy)
**Test file path**: Existing — no new test files required unless regressions found
**Proxy evidence**: `production/qa/c2-automated-proxy-2026-06-02.md`
**Run command**:
```powershell
./tools/unity/Invoke-ManualQaHeadlessGate.ps1
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests
```
**What to test** (proxy coverage before human Editor session):
- Checks 2–6: `C2SelectionFlowTests`, `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.Baltic_classify_map_symbols_*`
- Check 7: `LossesScoringCsvExporterTests`, `Baltic_patrol_scoring_csv_row_is_deterministic`
- Check 8: `BalticReplayHarnessCommsTests`, comms harness messages
- Checks 9–11: `Baltic_patrol_comms_harness_matches_manual_qa_preconditions`, `MapPanelBinderTests`, `Comms_denied_appends_policy_denial_*`
- Check 12: `FuelStateProjectionTests`, `FuelTimelineTrackerTests`, `FuelLedgerTests`
- Check 13: `DelegationBridgeAttackOptionTests`, `EngageAttackOrderResolverTests`, `UnitDetailBridgeTests`, `AttackMenuPanelBinderTests`

**Edge cases to cover** (proxy):
- COMMS DEGRADED vs DENIED symbology transitions
- Engage denied after DENIED — no new launches in order log
- Attack menu Fire Single with policy denial — order log row without launch

**Estimated test count**: ~0 new (existing **7** PlayMode + delegation/replay suite)

*Check 1 (no console errors) is Editor-only — not automatable.*

---

### S19-02 — Catalog P2-2 Bulk Chunked Import — Integration
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Import/CmoMarkdownBulkImportTests.cs` (new)
**Supporting paths**:
- `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Import/CmoMarkdownImportProposerTests.cs` (extend)
- `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/CatalogImportMarkdownCommandTests.cs` (extend)
**Run command**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~CmoMarkdown"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj --filter CatalogImportMarkdown
```
**What to test**:
- Chunk size default **500** sensors per `CatalogWriteGate.ProposeSensorBatch` call
- Stable sort before chunking — same input order → same batch boundaries across runs
- `maxRecords` cap respected for CI/smoke (curated slice, not full 7208)
- Rows failing TRL/confidence routed to `sensor_quarantine` (not direct INSERT)
- Provenance fields populated: `source_file`, `import_batch_id`, `citation_ref`
- `CmoMarkdownImporter` never calls `CatalogJsonImporter.WriteSqlite` on production path
- Post-approve: `ICatalogReader.GetSortedSensorBindings()` reflects committed rows in stable order
- CLI `catalog_import_markdown` JSON output: `ok`, `parsedCount`, `batchId`, approved/quarantined counts

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty markdown / zero parseable rows → zero batches, no crash
- Record count not divisible by 500 → final partial chunk
- `maxRecords` < chunk size → single batch ≤ maxRecords
- Duplicate platform/sensor IDs within batch → quarantine or reject per existing gate rules
- Re-import same approved batch → idempotent or explicit conflict (per `CatalogWriteGate` contract)

**GitNexus**: `npx gitnexus detect_changes --repo cmano-clone` after edits touching `CatalogWriteGate`

**Estimated test count**: ~8–12 integration tests

*No formula found in referenced plan doc — test cases derived from P2-2 acceptance rules in `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-04-catalog-phase2-import.md`.*

---

### S19-03 — Catalog P2-3 Snapshot Binding — Integration
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Snapshots/DbSnapshotBindingTests.cs` (new)
**Supporting paths**:
- `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Snapshots/DbSnapshotStoreTests.cs` (extend)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/ScenarioPackageTests.cs` (extend)
**Run command**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~DbSnapshot|ScenarioPackage"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGolden|ReplayOrderLog"
```
**What to test**:
- After human approve: `DbSnapshotStore` records `ReleaseVersion` + content hash
- `ScenarioPackage` carries `dbSnapshotId` resolved from scenario metadata / `dbRef`
- Snapshot manifest hash **stable** across two imports of the same approved batch (deterministic)
- Harness loads snapshot id from policy package — replay fingerprint unchanged unless catalog fixtures change
- `ICatalogReader` reads bindings from pinned snapshot, not ad-hoc DB state

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Scenario with unknown `dbRef` → explicit failure, not silent default
- Snapshot id mismatch between policy and store → load error with actionable message
- Empty approved batch → no orphan snapshot row
- Baltic patrol golden scenarios → replay PASS with existing pinned fingerprint

**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 integration tests

### S19-05 — OSINT Digest Runner (Headless) — Integration
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Osint/OsintDigestRunnerTests.cs` (new)
**Supporting paths**:
- `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Osint/OsintProposalGateTests.cs` (existing contract)
**Run command**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Osint"
```
**What to test**:
- Fixture digest file → `OsintDigestRunner` → `OsintProposalGate.Partition(discoveries)`
- Proposals at confidence **≥ 0.65** routed to `CatalogWriteGate.ProposeSensorBatch` (staging only)
- Records below threshold → log-only path (no write-gate call)
- Deterministic ordering: stable sort by `(sourceUrl, canonicalId)` — no wall-clock in hot path
- No direct DB commits without `CatalogWriteGate.ApproveBatch`
- End-to-end: digest → proposal batch id + counts returned

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty digest → zero proposals, zero gate calls
- All records below 0.65 → log-only, no staging
- Duplicate canonical IDs in digest → deterministic dedup or last-wins per gate contract
- `enableRealtimeSocialStream` remains `false` (DSA-1.3) — no live social connector invoked

**GitNexus**: **No edits** to `DelegationBridge` (CRITICAL)

**Estimated test count**: ~5–7 integration tests

*Deliverable `OsintDigestRunner` not yet on `main` — tests are spec targets for `/dev-story`.*

## Manual QA Checklist

### S19-01 — Unity C2 Manual Sign-off — UI
**Verification method**: Manual step-through per runbook
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead + human tester (Unity Editor)
**Evidence to capture**: Completed checklist rows + verdict in `production/qa/c2-manual-signoff-2026-06-02.md`
**Runbook**: `production/qa/sprint-18-c2-signoff-runbook-2026-06-04.md`

**Prerequisites**:
- [ ] Unity **6000.3.14f1** installed
- [ ] Headless pre-check PASS — `production/qa/smoke-2026-06-04.md` or fresh `/smoke-check sprint`
- [ ] Scenarios available: `baltic-patrol-classify`, `baltic-patrol-comms`
- [ ] Update build SHA in checklist header to current `main` commit

Checklist (translate all 13 AC rows):
- [ ] **1** Play Mode starts without console errors
- [ ] **2** Default unit selected — OOB row + map selection ring visible
- [ ] **3** Map ■ friendly click updates unit detail panel
- [ ] **4** OOB row click syncs map selection
- [ ] **5** Hostile ◆ contact shows CONTACT line in unit detail
- [ ] **6** CONTACTS tab click matches map selection
- [ ] **7** Top bar score ticks on engage event
- [ ] **8** Message log shows CONTACT and MISSION category lines
- [ ] **9** `baltic-patrol-comms`: COMMS bar transitions DEGRADED → DENIED
- [ ] **10** Hostile ◆ dimmed when degraded; all symbols dimmer when denied
- [ ] **11** Engage denied in log after DENIED — no new launches
- [ ] **12** Unit detail FUEL line updates over extended sim time
- [ ] **13** Attack menu: select friendly with hostile track → **Fire Single** → engage order in log (launch only if policy allows)
- [ ] All rows signed with tester name/date
- [ ] Verdict **PASS** recorded at bottom of checklist file
- [ ] On FAIL: bug filed under `production/qa/bugs/` with scenario + repro steps

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for Sprint 19:

1. **Solution build + test green** — `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` + `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` → 0 failures (baseline **385+**)
2. **PlayMode smoke** — `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests` → **7/7 PASS** (C2 selection, map symbology)
3. **Replay golden** — `ReplayGolden|ReplayOrderLog` → **7/7 PASS** (no regression from catalog/snapshot changes)
4. **C2 operator loop** — S19-01 human sign-off **13/13 PASS** OR documented blocker with headless proxy still green
5. **Catalog import path** — `catalog_import_markdown` CLI proposes + approves curated slice; quarantine report emitted (S19-02)
6. **Snapshot binding** — scenario harness loads `dbSnapshotId`; replay fingerprint stable (S19-03)
7. **OSINT proposal path** — fixture digest → staging batch via write gate; no bypass (S19-05)
8. **DelegationBridge untouched** — unless S19-01 reveals defect; GitNexus blast-radius check before any bridge edit
9. **Local CI gate** — when GitHub Actions billing blocked, SOP commands pass (S19-07)
10. **Performance** — no new frame spikes in C2 Play Mode; Cesium spike documented separately (S19-08)

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off. Reference this list when running that skill.*

**Quality gate commands** (from sprint plan):
```powershell
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGolden|ReplayOrderLog"
```

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| s19-01 | Can an operator complete the full C2 loop (select → comms degrade → attack menu) without confusion or desync? | 1 | Experienced (internal QA) |
| s19-08 | Does globe pan/zoom feel responsive enough for tactical picture at Baltic scale? | 1 | Experienced (Unity dev) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes for s19-01 must be written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint19-c2-signoff.md` and reviewed by qa-lead before S19-01 marked COMPLETE.

*s19-08 playtest is advisory — spike verdict in checklist suffices if PIVOT/KILL.*

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 19

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (S19-02, S19-03, S19-05)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for UI/Visual stories (S19-01 checklist PASS, S19-08 screenshots)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions — replay golden + PlayMode smoke unchanged unless fixtures intentionally updated
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] GitNexus `detect_changes` run after `CatalogWriteGate` / `ICatalogReader` edits
- [ ] Story status updated in `production/sprint-status.yaml` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] QA sign-off report: APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS (`/team-qa sprint`)

---

## Risk-Weighted Test Priority

| Priority | Stories | Rationale |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| P0 | S19-01, S19-02, S19-03 | Critical path — C2 close + catalog replay integrity |
| P1 | S19-05, S19-04 | OSINT e2e + epic closure depend on P0 green |
| P2 | S19-07, S19-06 | Process/docs — unblock merge policy + design debt |
| P3 | S19-08, S19-09 | Nice-to-have spike + knowledge retain |
